content:
# Recommendations — next plan iter (post iter-022)

## Closest-to-completion / prioritize
1. **S3 bridge — 2 sorries left, both in OcOfD.lean.** B1 closed this iter. Finish:
   - `exists_section_of_mem_carrierSubmoduleSheaf_zero` (L2370): the affine-cover GLUING (Hartshorne 6.3A
     global step). Affine arm `exists_section_of_forall_order_nonneg_affineOpen` is now sorry-free and ready to
     consume. Route: cover U by affine opens, affine arm per piece (order restricts by `sheafOf_carrierSet_mono`),
     glue via `C.left.sheaf.existsUnique_gluing`; overlaps agree by `germToFunctionField_injective`. ~150 lines.
   - `carrierSheaf_zero_iso_toModuleKSheaf` (L2454): naturality square. **DISPATCH WITH THE FORWARD-MORPHISM
     RESTRUCTURE** (planner's own recipe, re-confirmed by the prover): build `α : toModuleKPresheaf C ⟶
     carrierPresheaf 0` with explicit `germToFunctionField`-into-carrier components (⊥-branch = zero map), then
     `(asIso α).symm`. Naturality becomes computational (`germ_res'`); each `α.app U` iso by section-iso content.
     The current `NatIso.ofComponents` route is BLOCKED on unfolding the `.symm.toModuleIso` of an `ofBijective` —
     do NOT re-dispatch it as-is; the restructure dissolves the blocker.
   - These two are independent given the affine arm + section-iso components are in place → can be **parallel
     sub-lanes** within OcOfD only if split carefully (same file → serialize, or one lane both).

## Coverage debt — 3 new Lean helpers need blueprint entries (planner authors prose)
`archon dag-query unmatched` flags these in-cone (rest of 147 unmatched are off-cone substrate):
- `sheafOf.germToFunctionField_topIso_square` (OcOfD) — open-immersion germ-at-generic-pt compatibility square for
  `W.ι`. Realises B1 of `lem:exists_section_of_forall_order_nonneg_affineOpen`. Deps: `functionFieldIso`,
  `topIso`, `germ_stalkIso_hom`, `germ_res'`, `germ_stalkSpecializes`, `stalkCongr_hom`.
- `sheafOf.germToFunctionField_algebraMap` (OcOfD) — `k̄`-linearity (scalar-tower compat
  `germ U ∘ kToSection U = germ ⊤ ∘ kToSection ⊤`). Substrate for the forward map of
  `lem:carrierSheaf_zero_sections_eq_structureSheaf`. Deps: `kToSection_naturality`, `germ_res'`,
  `algebraMap_eq_kToSection`.
- `sheafOf.exists_section_of_mem_carrierSubmoduleSheaf_zero` (OcOfD, HAS sorry) — general-U surjectivity of
  `lem:carrierSheaf_zero_sections_eq_structureSheaf`. `\uses` `lem:exists_section_of_forall_order_nonneg_affineOpen`,
  `lem:sheafOf_carrierSet_mono`, structure-sheaf sheaf property.

## Stale status comments — route to next OcOfD prover (comment-only, review cannot edit .lean)
Recurring across iters; **next OcOfD prover should refresh in the same edit pass** (auditor iter022, 6 MAJOR):
- Module header sorry-count: names the skyscraper-cokernel SES (axiom-clean since iter-020) as blocker; does NOT
  name the live L2370 (surjectivity-gluing) / L2454 (naturality) sites.
- "3-tier disclosure" text (≈L69–73): claims all 4 public decls are Tier-3 sorry; `sheafOf`/`sheafOf_zero` are
  sorry-free.
- **Most misleading**: inline comment in `sheafOf` else-branch (≈L647–668) "the residual sorry is now exactly this
  cotangent-dimension fact" — the else branch contains NO sorry.
- Lean docstring ≈L2258–2264: still claims a B1 sorry that no longer exists.

## Do NOT retry without a structural change
- Naturality via `NatIso.ofComponents` on the `.symm.toModuleIso` components — BLOCKED on action-unfolding 2 iters
  running. Use the forward-morphism restructure (above) instead.

## Reusable patterns (carry forward)
- **`erw` for germ/stalk/assoc/map_mul/kToSection_naturality** on `CommRingCat.Hom.hom`-coerced terms (rw/simp
  only fail to match). This was the dominant friction all session.
- **Nonempty double-coercion**: supply both `Nonempty ↥↑U` and `Nonempty ↥U`; do not annotate the `↥↑` source.
- A sorry-bodied iso/component is still a usable term — assemble dependents around an isolated named leaf.

## Deferred (unchanged)
- S2 (Čech H¹ finiteness) and S4/M5 ("finite birational ⇒ iso") blueprint prep still deferred to post-S3 — open
  once the 2 bridge sorries close. S2 GATE reminder: pin the shared H²/Ext²-vanishing project lemma
  (`lem:grothendieck_vanishing_curve`, still a frontier ∞-free node used-by 4) before any S2 dispatch.
